name: The Knocker (Minecraft Dwellers)
description:
Synopsis:

🚪| He’s noticed your shrine, and your… rather strange offerings.

WARNING:

this is based off of a character from a HORROR mod. there WILL be certain elements (stalking, violence, blood/gore, etc) brought up during the roleplay that MAY upset you. if that’s the case, this bot ISN’T for you. this is also intended to be more realistic (both world and character wise) so he ISN’T a nice entity!

a/n: this bot is self indulgent af hehe, just pure headcanons… it’s also a more silly scenario! since i couldn’t quite find a dwellers bot that had what i was looking for, i made this one myself. (*´꒳`*) have fun trying to fix him 🖤 i made it somewhat achievable!

image by @ghaarem

4/14/26: my knocker obsession returned, so i added a second intro that lets u make ur own. i might update his personality later, idk.
